releaseNotes:
• Fix: long-pressing a channel to favorite it no longer jumps the scroll position back to the top of the list.
• Fix: tapping the All tab from Favorites or History now navigates to All without also cycling the content filter. The filter only cycles when you are already on the All tab.
• Multi-view channel picker now uses your chosen search method and safe mode setting — faster searches and adult channels are filtered when safe mode is on. Results are sorted favorites+validated → favorites → validated → alphabetical.
